TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tkijig ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 219 buwan, 684 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 60% kyan ku 410 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 40% kyan ku 274 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 50%, Amis 4%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tkijig hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tkijig hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tkijig hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tkijig hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Tkijig hya' ga Tpuqu. tay 'zil na Tkijig hya' ga Kulu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tkijiɣ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa tpuqu. taj ʔzil na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa kulu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tkijig ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 219 buwan, 684 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 60% kyan ku 410 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 40% kyan ku 274 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 50%, Amis 4%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tkijig hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tkijig hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tkijig hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tkijig hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Tkijig hya' ga Tpuqu. tay 'zil na Tkijig hya' ga Kulu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tkijiɣ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa tpuqu. taj ʔzil na tkijiɣ ħjaʔ ɣa kulu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
